brief: Oil prices rise as US-Iran tensions escalate; UK's new PM Burnham reshapes government; papers explore AI-assisted evaluation and multitasking agents.
news_summary: Canada and US resume trade talks amid tariff threats; oil surges above $90; Thames Water imposes hosepipe ban; Trump's HIV funding cuts spark global concern; Tropical Storm Bertha threatens Gulf.
papers_summary: Research examines rhetorical patterns for AI information evaluation and designing communication for effective multitasking with computer use agents; further studies address visualization literacy in VLMs.

en.brief: Oil prices rise as US-Iran tensions escalate; UK's new PM Burnham reshapes government; papers explore AI-assisted evaluation and multitasking agents.
en.news_summary: Canada and US resume trade talks amid tariff threats; oil surges above $90; Thames Water imposes hosepipe ban; Trump's HIV funding cuts spark global concern; Tropical Storm Bertha threatens Gulf.
en.papers_summary: Research examines rhetorical patterns for AI information evaluation and designing communication for effective multitasking with computer use agents; further studies address visualization literacy in VLMs.

zh.brief: 今日重點：英國新首相貝安德就職，廈門翔安機場引發台灣安全關切；智能戒指早期預測懷孕引起關注。研究方面無中文論文。
zh.news_summary: 英國前大曼徹斯特市長貝安德接任首相；深圳地鐵加強安檢引發民怨，廈門翔安機場距金門僅三公里，台灣憂軍事威脅；智能戒指能提前檢測懷孕。
zh.papers_summary: 無中文論文，英文研究聚焦AI輔助信息評估與設計工具。

todays_image.caption: The plant's name suggests splitting or divergence, mirroring the trade tensions as Canada faces potential new tariffs that could drive a wedge between it and the US.
todays_image.title: Dichapetalum petaloideum Breteler
